mapper.select:
SELECT id, code, name, address, ship_address, contact, phone, email, remark, status, deleted, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by FROM customer WHERE deleted = 0
AND ( name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR contact LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
